title: Tag Dimensions
content_html:
Tag Dimensions

Explore explicit dimensions that can score or classify works and series without confusing unlike meanings merely to fit one visualisation.

Feature Documents

  • Concept — semantic model, representation vocabulary, and unresolved product choices.
  • Architecture — proposed registry, ownership, scoring, and projection structure.
  • Small Dimension Set Delivery — one possible end-to-end proving outcome.
  • Analytics Roadmap — relative importance and sequence.

The feature is paused and not implemented. Current Analytics scoring measures tag completeness only.
